ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-11-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 5/12/08 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET IN DEPT. 220. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT COLONIAL SUGAR REFINERY STIPULATED TO DEFENDANT'S ANSWER MAY BE FILED BY 3/19/08 AND THE CASE IS AT ISSUE. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 APPLIES AND PARTIES STIPULATED TO MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BE HEARD UP TO ONE WEEK BEFORE TRIAL WITH TWO WEEKS NOTICE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR #4280
